subcodes.first_line: Would that it were possible for every newspaper to become detached from command, that the people might know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر چنانچه ممکن باشد که نسبت هر روزنامه ازامر منقطع گردد که مردم بدانند
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @chastisement and requital, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
